Mackenzie was seen entering the secluded area right before the murder, which directly places her at the scene at the critical time. Erika's motive (blackmail) might not have been as immediately threatening at that moment. Moreover, Mackenzie's unflappable composure during interrogation and her vague answers ("I make do") suggest she might be hiding something. Based on the evidence, Mackenzie seems more likely to be the murderer.
